name: Converse 500 Classic Light Mid 'Black Gold'
Converse Aeon Active CX A-COLD-WALL Black Apple Green
Converse Aeon Active CX A-COLD-WALL Micro Chip Healing Jade
Converse Aeon Active CX A-Cold-Wall Black
Converse Chuck Taylor All-Star 70 Hi A-COLD-WALL Pavement
story: The A-Cold-Wall* x Converse Chuck 70 High ‘Pavement’ reimagines the classic silhouette through Samuel Ross’ functional design ethos. The high-top sports a dark grey canvas upper, contrasted by Silver Birch accents on the tongue and pull loop. On the lateral side, alphanumeric branding is accompanied by a squared-off block of reflective film marked with the ACW logo. Contrast stitching and an All Star ankle patch maintain the classic Chuck Taylor look and feel, while translucent foxing delivers a contemporary flourish.

name: Converse Chuck Taylor All-Star 70 Hi A-COLD-WALL Silver Birch
story: The A-Cold-Wall* x Converse Chuck 70 High ‘Silver Birch’ reunites designer Samuel Ross with the iconic silhouette. Accentuating the shoe’s refined simplicity, the upper is crafted from breathable canvas in a neutral off-white finish. A traditional All Star patch decorates the medial ankle, while the lateral side displays the ACW logo framed in a block of reflective film. Silver alphanumeric branding runs above the midsole, wrapped in translucent rubber foxing that extends to the reinforced toe cap.

name: Converse Chuck Taylor All Star 70 Ox A-COLD-WALL Pavement
Converse Chuck Taylor All Star 70 Ox A-COLD-WALL Navy
Converse Chuck Taylor All Star 70 Ox A-COLD-WALL Green
Converse Chuck Taylor All-Star Lugged Hi A-COLD-WALL Black
story: Made in collaboration with the British menswear label helmed by Samuel Ross, the A-Cold-Wall* x Converse Chuck Taylor All Star Lugged High ‘Triple Black’ delivers a utilitarian take on the classic high-top. The monochromatic design makes use of a nylon ripstop upper with ghillie lacing and reflective zigzag stitching. Durable rubberized overlays are embellished with a tonal All Star patch and ACW branding. Underfoot, a lugged rubber outsole provides grippy traction.

name: Converse Chuck Taylor All-Star Lugged Hi A-COLD-WALL
Converse ERX 260 Mid A-COLD-WALL
Converse Geo Forma Boot A-COLD-WALL Onyx
story: A-COLD-WALL* x Geo Forma Boot 'Onyx' presents a weather-resistant silhouette that blends function with progressive style. Treated to a one-note black finish, the unique boot design is cloaked in a zip-up textile shroud, bolstered with fused TPU overlays and accented with a translucent All Star patch on the medial ankle. Reflective detailing on the toe offers enhanced visibility in low-light conditions. An elevated sole unit features a lugged outsole for reliable traction on uneven terrain.

name: Converse Geo Forma Boot A-COLD-WALL Lily White
Converse Geo Forma Boot A-COLD-WALL Volt
Converse Sponge CX Crater A-COLD-WALL Dark Grey Tangerine Tango
story: The A-Cold-Wall x Converse Sponge Crater CX ‘Dark Grey Tangerine Tango’ introduces a new slip-on silhouette developed in partnership with Samuel Ross and featuring easy wearability with a futuristic aesthetic. The orange flat-knit upper is equipped with a stretchy spandex collar and dual pull tabs for easy on and off. Reinforcing the sock-like build is a sculpted grey Crater foam body, complete with an open structure for improved breathability. The same lightweight material is utilized on the midsole, supported underfoot by an egg crate-style traction pod outsole.

name: Converse Weapon Ox A-COLD-WALL Flint Grey
story: The A-Cold-Wall* x Converse Weapon Low 'Flint Rust' reimagines the classic hoops shoe with a retooled low-top design. A neutral grey finish is applied to the upper, built with a combination of crinkled nylon and suede and secured with A-Cold-Wall*'s signature lacing system. Rust-colored textile lines the interior for a contrasting pop of color. 'ACW_CNVS' branding appears on the tongue tag, sockliner and medial collar. The sneaker rides atop a semi-translucent rubber cupsole.

name: A Ma Maniére x Converse Chuck 70 High 'While You Were Sleeping' Friends & Family
Converse Weapon Ox A Ma Maniére While You Were Sleeping
Converse Accelerator Mid 'Magic Johnson - Olympic' PE
Converse Chuck Taylor All Star 70 Hi Ader Error
Converse Chuck Taylor All Star 70 Hi Ader Error Create Next: The New Is Not New
Converse Chuck Taylor All Star 70 Low Ader Error Create Next: The New Is Not New
Converse Aeon Active CX Ox Obsidian Mist Himalayan Salt
Converse Aeon Active CX Ox Storm Wind
Converse Aero Jam Mid Hornets Home
Converse Aero Jam Hi Black Peacoat (2013)
Converse Aero Jam Hi Hornets Away
Converse Fastbreak Mid Al Davis Black Suede
Converse Pro Leather Hi Al Davis White Suede
Converse CONS AS-1 Pro Alexis Sablone Chameleon
story: The Alexis Sablone x Converse AS-1 Pro 'Chameleon' delivers a special-edition colorway that debuted alongside the USA skateboarding federation kits for the 2024 Summer Games in Paris. A lizard-inspired texture is applied to the wear-away white leather upper, contrasted by lavender suede accents on the collar and Star Chevron logo. A CX foam sockliner provides lightweight cushioning. Underfoot, a gum rubber outsole yields grippy traction.

name: Converse CONS Jack Purcell Pro Mid Alexis Sablone Pride Collection
Converse Jack Purcell Pro Mid Alexis Sablone
Converse Louie Lopez Low Alexis Sablone
Converse One Star Pro Low Alexis Sablone
Converse All-Star BB Evo Court Daze
Converse All-Star BB Evo Graffiti
Converse All-Star Evo BB Heart of the City Shanghai
Converse All-Star BB Evo Iridescent
Converse All-Star BB Evo ABA
story: The Converse All Star BB Evo Mid ‘ABA’ dresses the shoe in an old-school palette inspired by the American Basketball Association, the professional hoops league that merged with the NBA in 1976. Split color blocking is utilized on the upper, featuring lofted red mesh on the medial side and closed diamond textile in royal blue on the lateral side. Star Chevron branding graces the quarter panel, while the ABA logo is stamped on the tongue. A drop-in Nike React midsole provides lightweight cushioning with each step.

name: Converse All-Star BB Evo Mid Black White Outline
Converse All-Star BB Evo Hi-Vis White Green Glow
story: Launching as part of the ‘Hi-Vis Collection,’ the Converse All Star BB Evo Mid ‘White Green Glow’ adds eye-catching details to the performance hoops shoe inspired by the Chuck Taylor All Star. In addition to green and teal no-sew overlays, the sneaker’s white mesh upper is accented with glow-in-the-dark Star Chevron branding. The same luminescent finish is applied to the off-white rubber outsole, equipped with a diamond lug traction pattern for optimal grip.

name: Converse All-Star BB Evo Hi-Vis Black Sunset Glow
story: Launching as part of the ‘Hi-Vis Collection,’ the Converse All Star BB Evo Mid ‘Black Sunset Glow’ adds subtle pops of color to the sneaker’s black mesh upper, fortified with zonal padding around the collar and tonal no-sew overlays at the toe and heel. A drop-in Nike React midsole provides responsive cushioning, while the thin rubber outsole features a diamond lug traction pattern for superior grip on the hardwood.

name: Converse All-Star BB Evo Hi-Vis Black Lemon Venom
story: The Converse Hi-Vis All Star BB Evo Mid ‘Black Lemon Venom’ gives the performance basketball shoe a design makeover intended to stand out on the hardwood. A uniform black finish is applied to the upper, featuring 50/50 split construction made up of lofted mesh on the medial side and closed diamond textile on the opposite side. The latter is accented with Star Chevron branding that glows in the dark, a luminescent property that’s repeated on the semi-translucent rubber outsole in Lemon Venom.

name: Converse All-Star BB Evo Hi-Vis White Fresh Yellow
story: Launching as part of the ‘Hi-Vis Collection,’ the Converse All Star BB Evo Mid ‘White Fresh Yellow’ updates the performance hoops shoe with a pristine finish across a breathable engineered mesh upper. Yellow accents deliver subtle pops of color on the sneaker’s eyestay, vamp and quarter panel, decorated with Star Chevron branding. The lightweight build is enhanced with a Nike React drop-in midsole, delivering low-to-the ground responsive cushioning.

name: Converse All-Star BB Evo Polar Lights
Converse All-Star BB Evo Black University Red
story: The Converse All Star BB Evo ‘Rivals Pack’ features split black-and-white color blocking on the upper, constructed from engineered mesh on the medial side and closed diamond textile on the lateral side. A rail lace system offers an adaptive fit, while a drop-in Nike React midsole provides responsive and lightweight cushioning. A translucent rubber cupsole anchors the low-profile silhouette, outfitted with a diamond lug traction pattern for superior grip.

name: Converse All-Star BB Evo Blue Red Split Graphic
Converse All-Star BB Evo Wholehearted
Converse All Star BB Jet Mid Archive Print Leopard
Converse All Star BB Jet Mid Colorblock Black Navy
Converse All Star BB Jet Mid Peace and Unity
Converse All Star BB Jet Mid Sun Gradient
Converse All Star BB Jet Mid Worlds Collide
Converse All Star BB Prototype CX Mid Monster Clash Black Laser Lemon Red
Converse All Star BB Prototype CX Mid Yellow Casino
Converse All Star BB Shift Ox Black University Red
Converse All Star BB Shift Ox Black Pink Teal
Converse All Star BB Shift Ox Botanical
Converse All Star BB Shift Black Neon Pink
story: The Converse All Star BB Shift ‘Black Neon Pink’ showcases color-popped accents on a performance hoops shoe built with Nike cushioning. Vibrant streaks of color enliven the black Leno Weave upper, fortified with no-sew skins and accented with a pink Star Chevron logo on the lateral side. The low-top sits on a cushy foam midsole with a springy Zoom Turbo unit in the forefoot. A solid white rubber outsole features a multidirectional traction pattern for optimal grip.

name: Converse All-Star BB Shift Ox White Multi
Converse All Star BB Shift Ox Monster Clash Red
Converse All Star BX Shift Ox Monster Clash Black Volt
Converse All Star BB Shift White Pixel Purple
Converse All Star BB Trilliant CX Ox What The Black White
Converse All Star BB Trilliant CX Fever Dream
story: The Converse All Star BB Trilliant CX 'What The' showcases mismatched color blocking between the left and right shoe. The performance basketball shoe carries a seamless textile upper, equipped with a removable lace shroud and marked with signature Star Chevron branding on the lateral side. A molded support frame encages the foam midsole, fitted with a Nike Zoom Air unit in the forefoot for responsive cushioning. Underfoot, a rubber outsole features a traction pattern designed to grip the hardwood in all directions.

name: Converse All Star BB Trilliant CX Poison Dart Frog
Converse All Star Classic Trainer Suede 'Days Ahead'
Converse All Star Classic Trainer Suede 'Rugged Brown'
Converse All Star Classic Trainer Suede 'Black White'
Converse All Star Classic Trainer Suede 'Yellow Black'
Converse All Star Classic Trainer Suede 'Navy'
Converse All Star Classic Trainer Suede 'Archive Sea Green'
Converse All Star Classic Trainer Suede 'Moonbathe'
Converse All Star Classic Trainer Suede 'Cliffside Rose'
Converse All-Star Disrupt CX Black
story: The All Star Disrupt CX ‘Black’ delivers a futuristic take on the classic Chuck Taylor All Star. The minimalist all-black upper, crafted from stretch mesh for a comfortable fit, sits atop a lightweight phylon foam midsole for a cushioned ride. A three-dimensional rubber bumper stands out on the heel in a vibrant Wild Mango finish, providing added stability and an extra dose of style. Additional details include a reinforced toe cap, a circular All Star patch and a pull tab for easy entry.

name: Converse All-Star Disrupt CX White
Converse All-Star Disrupt CX Blue Slate
Converse All-Star Disrupt CX Field Surplus
story: The All Star Disrupt CX ‘Olive’ is one of the debut colorways of this modernized version of the iconic Chuck Taylor All Star. The reengineered build is highlighted by an exaggerated rubber bumper on the heel, finished in Wild Mango to contrast a white phylon foam midsole. The upper is crafted from stretch canvas in Field Surplus, complete with a circular All Star patch on the medial ankle and tonal no-sew overlays along the eyestay and toe.

name: Converse Chuck Taylor All-Star Spec Ox Dress Dress Blues
story: The Converse Chuck Taylor All Star Ox is defined by a premium construction and archival signatures rooted in court heritage. This variation—produced in December 2018—is brought together in Dress Blue canvas sporting a signature toe cap, durable metal eyelets and contrast stitching. All-Star labels are added to the tongue and heel. A vulcanized rubber outsole and gum Waffle tread are installed underfoot for traction.

name: Converse All-Star Pro BB Black Silver Orange
story: Based on the legendary Chuck Taylor design, the All Star Pro BB 'Black' is a mid-top basketball shoe fusing Nike technology with Converse heritage. The single-layer, quad-axial woven upper creates breathability and flexibility to promote structure and stability for multi-directional movement while down below, a React foam midsole responds to quick moves on the court. Maintaining the retro vibe, a Converse all-star patch, signature foxing tape and pinstripe are reminiscent of the past.

name: Converse All-Star Pro BB Camo
story: The Converse All Star Pro BB silhouette launched in May 2019. Capitalizing on the success of the initial release, the One Star brand released a two shoe 'Archive' Pack in August of the same year. Donning an all-over 'Camouflage' print, a quad-axial woven upper reacts to multi-directional movement and resists impact while honoring the original Chuck Taylor All Star printed shoe from 1983. A React foam midsole provides energy return for quick defensive moves and turnaround jumpers on the court.

name: Converse All-Star Pro BB City Pack Photon Dust
Converse All-Star Pro BB Low Petal to the Metal
Converse All-Star Pro BB Hyperbrights Pack
story: Debuting on the feet of Phoenix Suns small forward Kelly Oubre Jr. during a November 2019 game, the Converse All Star Pro BB 'Flames' features a fiery all-over graphic on the quad-axial woven upper. A Star Chevron logo in black adorns the sneaker’s lateral side, while the opposite side features contrast zigzag stitching and a circular All Star patch. A Nike React drop-in midsole delivers lightweight and responsive cushioning.

name: Converse All-Star Pro BB Black White
Converse All-Star Pro BB High Pale Putty Lotus Pink
Converse All-Star Pro BB Solstice
story: Dropping as part of a ‘Solstice’ pack celebrating summer hoops, the Converse All Star Pro BB High ‘White Royal Orange’ features a lightweight build developed in collaboration with renowned Nike Basketball designer Eric Avar. The sneaker’s quad-axial woven upper and drop-in Nike React midsole speak to the shoe’s modern performance benefits, while the foxing tape, pinstripe detailing and diamond-patterned outsole draw a connection to the iconic Chuck Taylor All Star.

name: Converse All-Star Pro BB Leopard
story: Honing in on history, the Converse All Star Pro BB comes in a 'Leopard' print for its August 2019 debut. The basketball sneaker is reminiscent of the original Chuck Taylors, donning a One Star chevron accent at the midfoot, a signature Converse logo at the ankle and pinstripe design along the base of the shoe. Delivering flexible stability, a quad-axial woven upper responds to impact and fuses with a React foam midsole and diamond-patterned outsole offering responsiveness below.

name: Converse All-Star Pro BB Low City Pack Black White
Converse All-Star Pro BB Draft Night
Converse All-Star BB Pro Low Eclipse
story: A low-top version of Converse’s performance basketball shoe, the All Star Pro BB Low 'Eclipse' features a Nike React drop-in midsole provides elite for lightweight and responsive cushioning. Up top, the sneaker uses foot-conforming Nike Quadfit mesh in contrasting black and white hues, complete with traditional Star Chevron branding on the lateral quarter panel. A semi-translucent rubber cupsole offers grippy traction underfoot.

name: Converse All-Star Pro BB Low Solstice
story: Releasing as part of the ‘Solstice’ pack dedicated to summer hoops, the Converse All Star Pro BB Low ‘University Blue’ delivers a lightweight performance shoe developed in collaboration with noted Nike Basketball designer Eric Avar. A monochromatic powder blue finish is applied to the quad-axial woven upper, accented with Star Chevron branding in contrasting white. A drop-in Nike React midsole offers responsive cushioning on the hardwood.

name: Converse All-Star Pro BB Low Soundwave
Converse All-Star Pro BB Grinch
story: The Converse All Star Pro BB ‘Nocturnal’ sits atop a glow-in-the-dark cupsole finished in Volt coloring, good for added style during nighttime pickup games. A similar gradient blend is featured on the upper, built with Nike Quadfit mesh for lightweight, breathable support. Red laces match the All Star patch on the medial ankle, while the opposite side showcases Star Chevron branding on the quarter panel. A drop-in Nike React insole provides responsive cushioning.

name: Converse All-Star Pro BB All-Star Pack
story: Delivered in October 2019, Converse's All Star Pro BB 'Then & Now' harmonizes an original color scheme with a modern design. The sneaker is composed of a Quadfit mesh upper in white with red for the Star Chevron emblem, heel panel and All-Star patch. Dual semi-transparent foxing tapes reinforce the sidewall. A drop-in React midsole and translucent, diamond-patterned rubber cupsole work together to generate response and traction.

name: Converse All-Star Pro BB White Black Orange
story: Legendary designer Eric Avar joined forces with Converse to launch the All Star pro BB in 'White' for this May 2019 debut. Featuring a quad-axial woven upper, the basketball sneaker delivers a lightweight ride with an adaptable fit. A star chevron design hits the midfoot in black, honoring quintessential Converse history while an orange pinstripe down below maintains the retro look. Reinforcing energy return underfoot, a React foam midsole collaborates with a Cupsole design to keep the foot in place.

name: Converse All Star Slide Pride (2022)
Converse Chuck Taylor All-Star 70 Hi Ambush Fuzzy Black
story: Dropping as part of a four-piece collection with the Tokyo-based fashion label, the AMBUSH x Converse Chuck 70 Fuzzy High ‘Black Egret’ dresses the sneaker in real shearling wool. Off-white laces emerge from the shaggy black material, along with a matching white All Star patch on the medial ankle. The high-top rides on a vulcanized rubber midsole, accented with an Ambush license plate on the left shoe and standard Converse branding on the right.

name: Converse Chuck Taylor All-Star 70 Hi Ambush Fuzzy Blue
story: Designed as a joint venture with the Tokyo-based fashion label, the AMBUSH x Converse Chuck 70 Fuzzy High ‘Navy Blue’ covers the iconic silhouette in genuine shearling wool, featuring a cut-out section on the medial side that reveals the signature All Star ankle patch. Off-white rubber is utilized on the toe cap and vulcanized midsole, accented with an Ambush license plate on the left shoe. Ambush branding makes its way to the custom sockliner.
